zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：窄幅整理偏震荡格局
zh.content:
当前价格围绕7美元窄幅波动，日内振幅收敛，短线处于横盘整理阶段。整体略偏震荡，尚未形成明确突破方向。市场观望情绪较浓，成交动能一般等待方向选择

MACD为正值但动能有限，短期多头略占优势但缺乏放量确认，RSI缺失使超买超卖判断受限。均线结构仍偏多头排列，短线动能平缓上行

下方支撑关注6.95与6.88(SMA20)，若跌破或回踩加深调整，上方阻力在7.01及7.05一带，突破需量能配合确认趋势

操作建议以区间交易为主，未突破7.01前不宜追多，可在6.95附近轻仓试多，跌破6.88则需止损观望。严格控制风险执行纪律

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Price action in AVAX/USD is currently consolidating just under the 7.00 handle, showing a mild intraday decline while still holding above short-term structural support. The broader tone remains cautiously constructive because price is trading above the 20-day SMA at 6.8829. This positioning suggests that the recent pullback is more of a corrective phase within a broader range rather than a full trend reversal, with volatility compressing around mid-range levels.

Momentum indicators show a mixed but still slightly positive bias. The MACD reading at 0.0436 indicates that bullish momentum has not fully faded, though the lack of a visible signal line value limits confirmation of trend strength and crossover dynamics. Price stability above key averages implies buyers are still active on dips, but the weak follow-through suggests hesitation. Without RSI, momentum must be inferred from price structure and MACD behavior, which currently leans neutral-to-slightly bullish.

Key support is anchored at the 20-day SMA near 6.88, which aligns closely with recent intraday lows and acts as the first defensive zone. Below that, additional support is likely around 6.85 and then 6.80, where prior consolidation could attract demand. On the upside, immediate resistance is defined by the recent high at 7.011, followed by a psychological extension near 7.10, which would likely require stronger volume to break convincingly.

From a trading perspective, range strategies are currently more favorable than breakout positioning. Buying near the 6.88–6.85 zone with tight risk controls below 6.80 could offer favorable risk-reward if support continues to hold. Alternatively, a decisive breakout above 7.01 with expanding momentum may signal a shift toward a bullish continuation phase. Until either boundary is breached, price action is likely to remain choppy within a tight equilibrium range.
